channel.title: Connect on Dark Pawns
channel.description: Recent content in Connect on Dark Pawns

item.title: Connection Instructions
item.description:
directions*

all directions are from market square unless otherwise noted.

cities

alaozar: 20 east, 5 north, 2 east, 30 north

kir-oshi: 16 south, 14 west, 20 south, 4 east

haven: (waterwalk required) all east, north, 2 east, follow road south

xixieqi: (waterwalk required) 41 south

newbie zones

the cold village: 11 west, 7 north

trolls: 18 west, 7 south

ender: 13 south, 4 west, down

midbie zones

sea cave lagoon: (need waterwalk) 15 south, 28 east, 7 south, 2 west, south, west, south, west, north

item.title: Contact Information
item.description:
contact*

Aidan: [aidan’s profile] [aidan’s email] [private message] [aidan’s AIM]

Tanis: [tanis’s profile] [tanis’s email] [private message] [tanis’s AIM]

 Name:




 E-mail:




 Comments:
  • we do not give out email addresses

item.title: External Links
item.description:
links*

related

the offical dark pawns homepage - contains general information about the game, an faq, city maps, and game updates.

the mud connector - the definitive resource for mudding on the web. well over a thousand different mud listings, resources for players and admins alike, as well as a message board.

<- back

item.title: MUD Client Downloads
item.description:
downloads*

Anything you could ever need to MUD.

mud clients

gMUD v1.9b (206kb)

Your standard MUD client. Freeware, ANSI support, relatively small scrollback buffer, trigger and alias support.

MUSHClient v3.45 (1.35mb) - One of the more feature-rich MUD clients available. Seemingly endless scrollback buffer; this one seems to be more popular with the trigger-reliant mudders. This is shareware, so the full program costs $20. Or you can use a serial code.
